name: Exponential Family / Energy-Based Distribution
description: Probability proportional to exp(-energy/temperature). Temperature controls exploration/exploitation, randomness/determinism.

name: Replicator / Selection Dynamics
description: Above-average things grow, below-average things shrink. The universal law of selection - in genes, beliefs, policies, and markets.

name: Gradient Flow / Energy Minimization
description: Systems flow downhill. The landscape varies (energy, cost, free energy, belief surprise), but the mathematics is identical.

name: Feedback / Self-Reference
description: The system measures its own state, compares to target, and adjusts. Temperature, noise level, precision weighting all modulate the feedback gain.

name: Hierarchical Decomposition / Scale Separation
form: Fast variables -> slaved to slow variables (order parameters)
description: Complex systems separate into levels. The top level (slow, coarse) controls the bottom level (fast, fine).

name: Conservation + Symmetry
description: Symmetry generates conservation. Break the symmetry to create a phase transition, a new conserved charge, or a new order parameter.

name: Fixed Points / Critical Phenomena
form: System has qualitatively distinct phases separated by critical points
description: Near critical points, systems become scale-free, maximally responsive, and display universal behavior independent of microscopic details.
